approaches.title: HashMap Counting
approaches.summary: Count occurrences of each element using a HashMap and return the first element exceeding half the array length.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial implementation using HashMap to count element frequencies and return the majority element.

approaches.title: Boyer-Moore Voting Algorithm
approaches.summary: Track a candidate and its strength; update candidate when strength drops to zero, increment on match, decrement otherwise.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Introduced Boyer-Moore Voting Algorithm to find majority element in O(n) time and O(1) space.
Simplified Boyer-Moore implementation by removing redundant strength reset and adjusting loop structure.
